decision: Positioning line locked: A multi-sensory cinematic literary experience unfolding in real time over six weeks.
reasoning: Line uses aspirational framing (cinematic, literary, multi-sensory) rather than oppositional — directly embodies the aspirational positioning thesis

Cross-reference research documented $1.55B in failed library-model platforms (Radish, Wattpad, Kindle Vella) and identified Quinn's premium curated model as the sole survivor — directly reinforcing the graveyard thesis. Kill test built on the premise that iteration sophistication is the moat, not volume.

Label strategy doc builds the full Indivizibel brand architecture — catalogue numbering, multi-format publishing, physical objects as catalogue items. Directly operationalizes the A24 label thesis with legal entity, trademark prosecution, and phased timeline.

Label strategy explicitly opens with 'Every failed serialized fiction venture — Quibi, Radish, Kindle Vella — made the same mistakes' and positions Indivizibel as premium, story-first, no micropayments.
Label strategy commits to $49/reader pricing throughout — revenue model, kill tests, and principles all built on experience pricing, not content pricing.
